contracts.notes: TASK execution context: outbound task_depends_on_task at depth 2 surfaces the precondition chain + cross-substrate FGAPs the task closes (via the same relation_type carrying TASK→project:FGAP sentinel edges); inbound feature_depends_on_item at depth 1 surfaces the FEAT this TASK implements + (via the same relation_type) the DEC/MODE/FB items the FEAT depends on. Composes the bundle a coder needs at TASK-002 dispatch time: which TASK precedes me, which FEAT I serve, which FGAPs I close, which DECs the FEAT realizes.

FEAT execution context: outbound feature_depends_on_item at depth 2 surfaces the DECs realized + FB items addressed + MODE (since FEAT→MODE uses same relation_type); inbound task_depends_on_task at depth 1 surfaces the TASKs implementing this FEAT. Composes the bundle a planner needs: what does this FEAT cover, what FB friction does it close, what TASKs implement it, what decisions ground it.

DEC execution context: inbound from 6 relation types — axiom (foundational ground), concept (referenced surface), dispatch-mode (mode realizing the decision), authority-doc (external grounding), friction-item (FB addressed by the decision class), v1-supersession (v1 section being superseded). Composes the bundle a reader needs to understand WHY the decision says what it says + WHAT it addresses.

FGAP execution context: outbound open_question_blocks_decision at depth 1 surfaces which DEC this gap blocks; inbound friction_item_files_to_gap at depth 1 surfaces FB items grounding the gap (cross-substrate sentinel form receives FB→project:FGAP edges; in-substrate FGAP-NNN receives the in-substrate FB→FGAP-NNN form). Composes the bundle a coder needs at FGAP closure time: what decision unblocks, what friction grounds the closure.

CONCEPT execution context: outbound to decisions citing it; inbound from FB items addressed at the concept layer + authority docs grounding the concept. Composes the bundle a reader/coder needs when the concept is referenced as the surface a fix targets.
